Brazilian gathering

January February 2006
Journalism & NewsroomInvestigative Methods

IRE participated in Brazil's first International Congress on Investigative Journalism in Rio de Janeiro, where the Brazilian Association for Investigative Journalism organized the event for over 300 attendees with support from IRE and the Knight Center.

IRE participated in Brazil's first International Congress on Investigative Journalism in Rio de Janeiro, Oct. 27-29. The Brazilian Association for Investigative Journalism (ABRAJI) conducted the conference with more than 300 journalists, students, and teachers. IRE provided training and support for the event, which was supported by the Knight Center for Journalism in the Americas.
